# Spool

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Spool;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Spool { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bobbin, spindle, yarn, thread, string, sewing, needlework

## Categories
communication, tools, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/spool)
